sentences.arabic: يَتَطَوَّرُ الذَّكَاءُ الِاصْطِنَاعِيُّ بِسُرْعَةٍ كَبِيرَةٍ فِي هَذَا الْعَصْرِ.
sentences.translation: Vještačka inteligencija se razvija veoma brzo u ovom dobu.
sentences.translationEn: Artificial intelligence is developing very quickly in this era.

sentences.arabic: تَعْمَلُ بَعْضُ الْبَرَامِجِ مِثْلَ الْإِنْسَانِ لِحَلِّ الْمُشْكِلَاتِ الصَّعْبَةِ.
sentences.translation: Neki programi rade poput čovjeka kako bi riješili teške probleme.
sentences.translationEn: Some programs work like humans to solve difficult problems.

sentences.arabic: يَسْتَخْدِمُ النَّاسُ هَذِهِ التِّقْنِيَّةَ فِي الطِّبِّ وَالصِّنَاعَةِ وَالتَّعْلِيمِ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi koriste ovu tehnologiju u medicini, industriji i obrazovanju.
sentences.translationEn: People use this technology in medicine, industry, and education.
